chunks.text: Industrial and Public Relations Staff - EECS at Berkeley. Industrial and Public Relations Staff. External Relations Group (XRG). XRG is the EECS department’s primary interface with the general public. They manage the Corporate Access Program (CAP)–which offers first tier access to our graduating students for institutions who donate to the department annually; alumni relations; the EECS Joint Colloquium; the Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS); the External Advisory Board (EAB); and all public relations matters.
chunks.question: What is the role of the External Relations Group in EECS?
chunks.answer: Primary interface with the public managing various programs.

chunks.text: Industrial & Public Relations Contacts: public-relations@eecs.berkeley.edu for public relations, media, and general questions; gifts@eecs.berkeley.edu for gifts and donations; news@eecs.berkeley.edu for reporting news about faculty, students, alumni, and staff; alumni-relations@eecs.berkeley.edu; bears-admin@eecs.berkeley.edu for BEARS questions; colloquium@eecs.berkeley.edu for EECS Joint Colloquium questions; cap-admin@eecs.berkeley.edu for Corporate Access Programs questions; eab-admin@eecs.berkeley.edu for External Advisory Board questions.
chunks.question: What email is used for reporting news in EECS?

chunks.text: Director of External Relations: Bennett Agnew, 221 Cory Hall, +1 (510) 735-7043, bennettagnew@eecs.berkeley.edu. Responsibilities include alumni relations, industrial partnership development, and special projects.
chunks.question: Who is the Director of External Relations and their role?
chunks.answer: Bennett Agnew handles alumni and industrial partnerships.

chunks.text: Development Coordinators: Vivian Le, 231 Cory Hall, +1 (510) 643-0855, vivian.le@eecs.berkeley.edu, manages EECS gifts, Colloquium, and special events. James Greene, 231 Cory Hall, +1 (510) 643-6850, jpgreene@eecs.berkeley.edu, handles student relations, industrial partnership development, and special projects.
chunks.question: What are the roles of the Development Coordinators?
chunks.answer: Vivian Le manages gifts and events; James Greene handles student relations.

chunks.text: Communications: Matthew Santillan, 253B Cory, +1 (510) 643-4976, msantillan@eecs.berkeley.edu, responsible for news, public relations, social media, departmental website management, and special projects.
chunks.question: What does Matthew Santillan manage in communications?
chunks.answer: News, PR, social media, and website management.
